articles.description: Andre scores a 94th-minute winner as bottom club Wolves beat the defending champions Liverpool.
articles.title: Wolves 2-1 Liverpool: Andre scores injury-time winner for bottom club against champions

articles.description: US President Donald Trump says he does not care if Iran take part in this summer's 2026 World Cup.
articles.title: US President Donald Trump does not care if Iran play at 2026 World Cup

articles.description: A "clear win" was what Sarina Wiegman wanted from her England side against Ukraine - and that was what they delivered in a bright start to their World Cup qualifying campaign.
articles.title: England beat Ukraine 6-1 to deliver 'clear win' that Sarina Wiegman demanded

articles.description: South Africa are the only unbeaten team left at the T20 World Cup and go into their semi-final against New Zealand  as favourites, so it is time to trust them despite their past in global tournaments?
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Can South Africa be trusted as tournament favourites before New Zealand semi-final?

articles.description: Leeds suffer a damaging defeat in their bid to remain in the Premier League as a second-half Habib Diarra penalty secures victory for Sunderland at Elland Road.
articles.title: Leeds 0-1 Sunderland - Second-half penalty seals victory for Black Cats

articles.description: Brighton manager Fabian Hurzeler calls for stricter rules around set-pieces and criticises upcoming opponents Arsenal for time-wasting.
articles.title: Arsenal set-pieces: Brighton's Fabian Hurzeler criticises Gunners

articles.description: In a new-look team Seb Atkinson and Fin Smith's teenage days in the Worcester academy could be key for England against Italy in Rome.
articles.title: Seb Atkinson: Centre on decade-long relationship with England team-mate Fin Smith

articles.description: Goals from James Tarkowski and Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall help Everton record a first Premier League home win of 2026.
articles.title: Everton 2-0 Burnley: James Tarkowski helps hosts earn first home win of 2026

articles.description: Players and officials ran from the court at an ATP Challenger event in the United Arab Emirates when an Iranian drone attack led to a fire breaking out at an oil terminal located about 10km away.
articles.title: Middle East conflict: Tennis players flee court after Iranian drone attack in UAE causes fire at nearby oil terminal

articles.description: Jon Rahm claims the DP World Tour is "extorting players" as he outlined why he is not among a group of LIV Golf competitors to have signed a settlement enabling them to play in both organisations' tournaments.
articles.title: Rahm accuses DP World Tour of 'extorting players'
